title: Buggy Takes the Stage
description: On pages 12–15, this part begins the Orange Town storyline, where Nami’s schemes and Buggy’s crew pull Luffy and Zoro into a new conflict.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AMAZING. SHE USED THE WEATHER TO HER OWN ADVANTAGE. SHE MUST REALLY KNOW THE SEAS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SHE'D MAKE A GREAT NAVI- GATOR...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WE THINK SHE'LL MAKE A GREAT CORPSE!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHAT'LL WE DO ABOUT THE TREASURE WE LOST?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IF WE RETURN empty-handed, BUGGY WILL BE FURIOUS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHO'S THIS BUGGY GUY ANY ANY ANY ANY WAYAY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Only the most Fero- Claus pirate in these parts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haven't you heard of buggy the clown? He ate the fruit of the devil!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A map of the GRAND LINE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DON'T WANT TO BE KILLED BY ONE OF THE CAPTAIN'S CANNON- BALLS!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: IF WE DON'T GET THAT MAP BACK, WE'RE DEAD!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: CAP'N BUGGY! THERE'S SOMETHING ODD IN THE SKY!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: SHOOT IT DOWN WITH THE CANNON!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHO'S SHOOTING CANNON- BALS AT ME!?

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
